message:
fix(ci): Resolve macOS path issues for test_sys and test_sysconfig

- Add TMPDIR resolution to fix /var vs /private/var symlink mismatch
- Use actual Python binary instead of framework stub for test_sys
- Ensures consistent environment for fair CPython vs Metal0 comparison

files.patch:
@@ -51,12 +51,19 @@ runs:
       run: |
         cd tests/cpython
         export LC_ALL=C
+
+        # Fix 1: Resolve /var -> /private/var symlink for test_sysconfig
+        export TMPDIR=$(python3 -c "import os; print(os.path.realpath(os.environ.get('TMPDIR', '/tmp')))")
+
+        # Fix 2: Get actual Python binary (not framework stub) for test_sys
+        PYTHON_BIN=$(python3 -c "import sys; print(sys.orig_argv[0] if sys.orig_argv else sys.executable)")
+
         PASSED=0; FAILED=0; TOTAL=0
         while IFS= read -r test || [ -n "$test" ]; do
           [ -z "$test" ] && continue
           TOTAL=$((TOTAL + 1))
-          # Run with 'script' to provide proper PTY (macOS syntax)
-          OUTPUT=$(script -q /dev/null python3 -m test test_${test} 2>&1) || true
+          # Run with 'script' to provide proper PTY, using actual binary
+          OUTPUT=$(script -q /dev/null $PYTHON_BIN -m test test_${test} 2>&1) || true
           echo "$OUTPUT"
           if echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -qE "(Tests result: SUCCESS|Result: SUCCESS|Result: NO TESTS RAN)"; then
             PASSED=$((PASSED + 1))

@@ -60,6 +60,9 @@ runs:
       if: inputs.os == 'macos'
       shell: bash
       run: |
+        # Fix: Resolve /var -> /private/var symlink for consistent paths
+        export TMPDIR=$(python3 -c "import os; print(os.path.realpath(os.environ.get('TMPDIR', '/tmp')))")
+
         # Run with 'script' to provide proper PTY (macOS syntax)
         set +e
         script -q /dev/null ./zig-out/bin/metal0 test tests/cpython ${{ inputs.group }} 2>&1 | tee test_output.txt
